text:
HEDIS Medicare Advantage Plan All-Cause Readmissions (PCR) File (referred to as File 2 in the file name) is a patient-level file that contains all variables pertinent to the PCR measure. There is a separate record for each acute inpatient hospital discharge during the year.

What does this file include? (variable highlights)
Readmission indicator
Chronic condition weight
Each record represents a hospitalization for a beneficiary in the calendar year (CY). Beneficiaries with multiple
